```{r imports}
library(plotly)
library(tidyverse)
library(compmus)
library(tidymodels)
library(ggdendro)
library(heatmaply)
```


---
title: "Lightning At The Door"
sidebar: latd
format:
  html:
    theme: quartz
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

# Tracklist

- Song 1
- Song 2
- Song 3

# Review

Your review content here.
